grades.expectation: Response mentions CQS training requirements for all conveyancing staff
grades.reason: Section 7 explicitly addresses CQS mandatory training requirements and verification of completion status

grades.expectation: Response covers protocol awareness and compliance training
grades.reason: Section 2 thoroughly covers Law Society Conveyancing Protocol training including matter lifecycle, exchange/completion controls, and TA forms

grades.expectation: Response mentions supervision requirements for new staff
grades.reason: Section 1 explicitly details supervision requirements including named supervisor allocation, frequency of reviews, and escalation routes

grades.expectation: Response references the need to maintain training records as CQS evidence
grades.reason: Every section includes detailed 'Evidence to keep' requirements for training records, completion certificates, and audit trails

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CQS firm-level requirements from individual SRA competence
grades.reason: While the response focuses on CQS requirements, it doesn't clearly distinguish these from individual SRA competence requirements or explain the difference
